/usr/bin/ar qc liblib_adapter.a  CMakeFiles/lib_adapter.dir/any_adapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_adapter.dir/monitor_adapter.cpp.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/server.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/adapter.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/unary.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/config.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/stream.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/server.grpc.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/adapter.grpc.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/unary.grpc.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/config.grpc.pb.cc.o ../server/CMakeFiles/proto-objects.dir/generated/stream.grpc.pb.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblib_adapter.a
